cases.input: Add a custom subagent that reviews pull requests for our repo, with least-privilege tools.
Certify the skill at ./skills/nda-review and tell me if it is production ready.
I want a detailed spec for a new tariff-analysis skill, no build yet, just frontmatter and procedure.
Port our system prompt from Claude to Gemini and add adversarial test cases.
Take the cold-call-prep skill all the way to production and prove the quality gain.
Turn our incident response process into a phased slash command with handoffs.
Plan an MCP server config with transport, auth, secret handling and a rollback path.
Regenerate skills_index.json by scanning every SKILL.md for BM25 search.
Compare our two skill versions and also clean them up.
Run the existing earnings-analysis skill on this quarter's filing.
Benchmark v1 against v2 of the buyer-list skill and give me the net assessment.
Audit the saas-msa-review skill and surface the top five gaps.
